subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-02 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: With the appearance of the Truth the point of opposition raises its head. The former gains signal victory; the other goes into crushing defeat.
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @things are known by their opposites
